title: calystegia subacaulis subsp. subacaulis
intro: Calystegia subacaulis subsp. subacaulis, also known as the slender bindweed, is a flowering plant species within the morning glory family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calystegia subacaulis subsp. subacaulis include reducing inflammation, alleviating muscle spasms, and protecting against oxidative stress, which can contribute to various diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
